description_long: This is a two-story brick house surrounded by a dense arrangement of leafy green trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The house features a dark, gabled roof with several skylights or roof windows, and a prominent curved bay window on one side, adding architectural interest. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, with white-framed windows distributed across all visible sides. A white picket fence encloses the property, and a paved walkway leads up to the main entrance. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees providing shade and partially obscuring the house from some angles. The overall design suggests a traditional, early American or Colonial Revival style, with symmetrical window placement and classic residential proportions.
description: A two-story red brick house with a dark gabled roof, surrounded by mature leafy trees and enclosed by a white picket fence. Features include a curved bay window, symmetrical white-framed windows, and a private, shaded yard.
description_view_0: The front and right sides of the house are visible, showing the main entrance, curved bay window, and dense tree coverage around the property.
description_view_1: The left side of the house is prominent, with the white picket fence and trees partially obscuring the brick facade and windows.
description_view_2: The rear and left sides of the house are visible, with more trees and the back of the white fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_3: The rear and right sides of the house are shown, highlighting the back entrance, additional windows, and the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a prominent curved bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, small steps, and a white picket fence gate, framed by trees and a paved walkway
